mapper.insert: INSERT INTO occupancy_report (classroom_id, is_occupied, reporter, people_count, duration) VALUES (#{classroomId}, #{isOccupied}, #{reporter}, #{peopleCount}, #{duration})
mapper.select: SELECT id, classroom_id, is_occupied, reporter, people_count, duration, create_time FROM occupancy_report WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id, t.classroom_id, t.is_occupied, t.reporter, t.people_count, t.duration, t.create_time FROM occupancy_report t INNER JOIN ( SELECT classroom_id, MAX(create_time) AS max_time FROM occupancy_report WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY classroom_id ) latest ON t.classroom_id = latest.classroom_id AND t.create_time = latest.max_time

SELECT id, classroom_id, is_occupied, reporter, people_count, duration, create_time FROM occupancy_report WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND create_time <= NOW() AND ADDTIME(create_time, duration) >= NOW() ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO occupancy_report (classroom_id, is_occupied, reporter, people_count, duration) VALUES
(#{r.classroomId}, #{r.isOccupied}, #{r.reporter}, #{r.peopleCount}, #{r.duration})
